problem_areas: Daily conditions need stronger, biologically coherent influence on rank movement.
Every library archetype must have an intentional role and measurable reach target.
Specialty winners need narrow but real primary windows instead of permanent support-only status.
Top-3 diversity must stay tactically coherent rather than mixing contradictory stories.
Audit output must expose dead archetypes, sticky rows, and intended-vs-actual mismatches.

role_definitions.winner_capable: Should legitimately win rank 1 in at least one intended scenario.
role_definitions.top3_support: Should reach the top 3 in intended scenarios, but is not required to own rank 1.
role_definitions.intentional_low_frequency_specialty: Narrow-context tool that should surface rarely, but still only in biologically credible windows.

lowest_top3_presence.notes: Deeper dragging stick-worm support lane on structure.
Shallow clear-water finesse fall for neutral or pressured fish.
Small-profile jig for pressured fish and smaller forage.

top1_leaders.notes: Shallow moving bluegill or baitfish jig lane.

reachability_by_id.notes: Shallow clear-water finesse fall for neutral or pressured fish.
Weedless stick-worm cover lane across shallow to mid-depth.

Subtle bottom-worm lane for pressured or clear-water fish.
Tiny bottom finesse lane for tough pressured conditions.
Weedless craw lane in cover and current seams.
Small-profile jig for pressured fish and smaller forage.
Shallow moving bluegill or baitfish jig lane.
Thumping cover-search lane with baitfish/craw crossover.
Flash search lane in open or current water.

Shallow waking or stripped sculpin lane.
Heavy articulated streamer with added push.
Lean baitfish streamer for active fish.
